description_long: This is a portable fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a white base and top. The front features a large, multi-colored instructional label with text and pictograms, providing usage directions and safety information. A gray hose is attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side, with a nozzle at the end for directing the extinguishing agent. The top of the extinguisher has a prominent gray handle and lever mechanism for operation, along with a safety pin. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and the overall build appears robust and industrial, suitable for emergency use in urban environments. The extinguisher is designed to be easily accessible and operable in case of fire emergencies.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a white base, gray handle, and attached hose, featuring a large instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, handle, and hose attachment clearly.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the curvature of the hose and the back portion of the label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red body, hose attachment, and a small rectangular panel.
description_view_3: Back-side view focusing on the hose's full length and the unmarked rear surface.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large, multi-colored instructional label with text and pictograms on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Gray hose attached near the top, curving down the side, with a nozzle at the end; hose is secured to the body.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: Gray safety pin visible at the top near the handle.
